$comment: Hash-pin manifest for vendored SHACL shapes (ADR-0014 Phase 1). Each entry pins a vendored shape's exact content (sha256) so a shape cannot change silently. `npm run check:shapes` recomputes every file's hash and fails on drift. To update a shape: re-vendor from `source.repo`, bump `source.commit`, recompute `sha256`, and commit the new lock in the SAME change as the .ttl. Do NOT hand-edit a vendored .ttl — it must stay byte-identical to its upstream source so the hash is verifiable against that source.

shapes/issue.ttl.describes: The solid-issues issue data model: wf:Task (issue), wf:Message (comment), as:Announce (assignment notification), wf:State (configurable workflow status), prov:Activity (provenance log). PM writes wf:Task via src/lib/issues.ts, so this shape advisory-validates PM issue writes for federation compatibility with solid-issues.
